\multicolumn{3}{l}{\textbf{Preamble}} \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-PRE-001}{\code{JSS-PRE-001}} & Document class must be jss with a valid class option (article, codesnippet, bookreview, softwarereview) & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-PRE-002}{\code{JSS-PRE-002}} & Preamble defines \code{\textbackslash{}Address\{\}} with author affiliation and contact & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-PRE-003}{\code{JSS-PRE-003}} & When \code{\textbackslash{}title\{\}} contains LaTeX markup, preamble also defines \code{\textbackslash{}Plaintitle\{\}} with the markup-free form & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-PRE-004}{\code{JSS-PRE-004}} & \code{\textbackslash{}Abstract\{\}} is present and overrides the sentinel placeholder from jss.cls & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-PRE-005}{\code{JSS-PRE-005}} & \code{\textbackslash{}Keywords\{\}} is present and overrides the sentinel placeholder from jss.cls & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-PRE-006}{\code{JSS-PRE-006}} & \code{\textbackslash{}Plaintitle}, \code{\textbackslash{}Plainauthor}, \code{\textbackslash{}Plainkeywords} contain no LaTeX markup (PDF metadata must be plain text) & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-PRE-007}{\code{JSS-PRE-007}} & When \code{\textbackslash{}author\{\}} contains LaTeX markup, preamble also defines \code{\textbackslash{}Plainauthor\{\}} with the markup-free form & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-PRE-008}{\code{JSS-PRE-008}} & When \code{\textbackslash{}Keywords\{\}} contains LaTeX markup, preamble also defines \code{\textbackslash{}Plainkeywords\{\}} with the markup-free form & --- \\
\addlinespace
\multicolumn{3}{l}{\textbf{Structure}} \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-STRUCT-001}{\code{JSS-STRUCT-001}} & Document ends with a summary / discussion section before the bibliography & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-STRUCT-002}{\code{JSS-STRUCT-002}} & Acknowledgments section uses American spelling (not ``Acknowledgements'') & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-STRUCT-003}{\code{JSS-STRUCT-003}} & Appendix sections have proper titles instead of a bare ``Appendix'' & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-STRUCT-004}{\code{JSS-STRUCT-004}} & References are declared via \code{\textbackslash{}bibliography\{\}} rather than a hand-written thebibliography environment & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-STRUCT-005}{\code{JSS-STRUCT-005}} & \code{\textbackslash{}author\{\}} separates authors with \code{\textbackslash{}And} or \code{\textbackslash{}AND} (not lowercase \code{\textbackslash{}and}) & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-STRUCT-006}{\code{JSS-STRUCT-006}} & Appendix follows the bibliography with a \code{\textbackslash{}newpage} (or \code{\textbackslash{}clearpage}) separator & 100.0\% \\
\addlinespace
\multicolumn{3}{l}{\textbf{Markup}} \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-MARKUP-001}{\code{JSS-MARKUP-001}} & Programming-language names in prose are wrapped in \code{\textbackslash{}proglang\{\}} & 86.2\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-MARKUP-002}{\code{JSS-MARKUP-002}} & Software-package names in prose are wrapped in \code{\textbackslash{}pkg\{\}} & 99.6\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-MARKUP-003}{\code{JSS-MARKUP-003}} & Inline function, argument, command names, and R sentinel values are wrapped in \code{\textbackslash{}code\{\}} & 93.7\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-MARKUP-004}{\code{JSS-MARKUP-004}} & Section titles containing markup supply a plain-text shim via \code{\textbackslash{}section}[plain]\{markup\} & 100.0\% \\
\addlinespace
\multicolumn{3}{l}{\textbf{Citations}} \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-CITE-002}{\code{JSS-CITE-002}} & First occurrence of a software package has a citation within the same paragraph & 90.9\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-CITE-003}{\code{JSS-CITE-003}} & Avoid bracket-in-bracket citation forms like (\code{\textbackslash{}cite}\{...\}); use \code{\textbackslash{}citep}\{...\} instead & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-CITE-004}{\code{JSS-CITE-004}} & Citations use natbib commands (\code{\textbackslash{}cite}, \code{\textbackslash{}citet}, \code{\textbackslash{}citep}, \code{\textbackslash{}citealp}) rather than hardcoded author-year text & 100.0\% \\
\addlinespace
\multicolumn{3}{l}{\textbf{References}} \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-REFS-001}{\code{JSS-REFS-001}} & BibTeX entries carry a year field so natbib author-year citations render correctly & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-REFS-003}{\code{JSS-REFS-003}} & BibTeX entries include a doi field where one is available (advisory) & 96.3\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-REFS-004}{\code{JSS-REFS-004}} & BibTeX titles use JSS markup (\code{\textbackslash{}proglang}, \code{\textbackslash{}pkg}, \code{\textbackslash{}code}) for language and package names & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-REFS-005}{\code{JSS-REFS-005}} & Journal titles in BibTeX entries are not abbreviated & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-REFS-006}{\code{JSS-REFS-006}} & BibTeX titles are in title style — loose heuristic (flags lowercase first word or unusual mixed case) & 98.8\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-REFS-007}{\code{JSS-REFS-007}} & Journal titles in BibTeX entries are in title case & 100.0\% \\
\addlinespace
\multicolumn{3}{l}{\textbf{Bibtex}} \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-BIBTEX-001}{\code{JSS-BIBTEX-001}} & Every BibTeX entry has a non-empty citation key & --- \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-BIBTEX-002}{\code{JSS-BIBTEX-002}} & BibTeX citation keys are unique within the database & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-BIBTEX-003}{\code{JSS-BIBTEX-003}} & BibTeX entries carry the fields required for their entry type (article, book, inproceedings, …) & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-BIBTEX-004}{\code{JSS-BIBTEX-004}} & Entries with 6+ authors use \code{\textbackslash{}shortcites\{\}} or the shortnames class option is enabled & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-BIBTEX-005}{\code{JSS-BIBTEX-005}} & No BibTeX field key is repeated within a single entry & 100.0\% \\
\addlinespace
\multicolumn{3}{l}{\textbf{Naming}} \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-NAME-001}{\code{JSS-NAME-001}} & Programming-language names use their canonical capitalization & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-NAME-002}{\code{JSS-NAME-002}} & Publisher and journal names follow JSS conventions (e.g., ``Springer-Verlag'', ``The Annals of Statistics'') & 100.0\% \\
\addlinespace
\multicolumn{3}{l}{\textbf{Capitalization}} \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-CAP-001}{\code{JSS-CAP-001}} & \code{\textbackslash{}title\{\}} is in title style (principal words capitalized) & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-CAP-002}{\code{JSS-CAP-002}} & Section titles are in sentence style (first word capitalized; others lowercase except proper names) & 98.3\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-CAP-004}{\code{JSS-CAP-004}} & \code{\textbackslash{}Keywords\{\}} is comma-separated and in sentence case & 100.0\% \\
\addlinespace
\multicolumn{3}{l}{\textbf{Typography}} \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-TYPO-001}{\code{JSS-TYPO-001}} & Figure and table captions end with a period & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-TYPO-002}{\code{JSS-TYPO-002}} & Figure / table captions avoid emphasis macros wrapping the whole caption (\code{\textbackslash{}emph}, \code{\textbackslash{}textbf}, \code{\textbackslash{}textit} on full caption) & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-TYPO-003}{\code{JSS-TYPO-003}} & Tables do not use footnote-style annotations; annotations go in the caption & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-TYPO-004}{\code{JSS-TYPO-004}} & \code{\textbackslash{}caption\{\}} appears after the figure / table content, not before & 100.0\% \\
\addlinespace
\multicolumn{3}{l}{\textbf{Abbreviations}} \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-ABBR-001}{\code{JSS-ABBR-001}} & Abbreviations are in uppercase without periods or additional formatting & 100.0\% \\
\addlinespace
\multicolumn{3}{l}{\textbf{Code style}} \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-CODE-001}{\code{JSS-CODE-001}} & Verbatim / CodeInput blocks do not contain comments; comments belong in the surrounding LaTeX text & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-CODE-002}{\code{JSS-CODE-002}} & R library() and data() calls quote their first argument & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-CODE-003}{\code{JSS-CODE-003}} & Code samples use spaces around operators and after commas & 99.3\% \\
\addlinespace
\multicolumn{3}{l}{\textbf{Code width}} \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-WIDTH-001}{\code{JSS-WIDTH-001}} & Code input / output inside Sinput / CodeInput / CodeOutput environments fits within the configured column limit & 100.0\% \\
\addlinespace
\multicolumn{3}{l}{\textbf{Operators}} \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-OPER-001}{\code{JSS-OPER-001}} & Symbol-plus-noun constructs like p-value and t-statistic are typeset as \$p\$\textasciitilde{}value and \$t\$\textasciitilde{}statistic (tie, no hyphen) & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-OPER-002}{\code{JSS-OPER-002}} & Transpose is typeset with \code{\textbackslash{}top} rather than a superscript prime or literal T & 98.8\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-OPER-003}{\code{JSS-OPER-003}} & Display equations have no blank lines immediately before or after (use \% to suppress paragraph breaks) & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-OPER-004}{\code{JSS-OPER-004}} & Expectation / variance / covariance / probability use jss.cls shortcuts \code{\textbackslash{}E}, \code{\textbackslash{}VAR}, \code{\textbackslash{}COV}, \code{\textbackslash{}Prob} & 96.6\% \\
\addlinespace
\multicolumn{3}{l}{\textbf{Crossrefs}} \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-XREF-001}{\code{JSS-XREF-001}} & Figures and tables are referenced via \code{\textbackslash{}ref\{\}} rather than by manual numbering & 95.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-XREF-002}{\code{JSS-XREF-002}} & Equation references prefer Equation\textasciitilde{}\code{\textbackslash{}ref}\{...\} (capitalized) over bare (\code{\textbackslash{}ref}\{...\}) or \code{\textbackslash{}eqref}\{...\} & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-XREF-003}{\code{JSS-XREF-003}} & Cross-references to subsections use ``Section x.y'' rather than ``Subsection x.y'' & --- \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-XREF-004}{\code{JSS-XREF-004}} & Numbered equations carry \code{\textbackslash{}label\{\}} and are referenced from the text & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-XREF-005}{\code{JSS-XREF-005}} & Figures and tables carry \code{\textbackslash{}label\{\}} and are referenced from the text & 99.6\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-XREF-006}{\code{JSS-XREF-006}} & Figure and table floats carry a \code{\textbackslash{}caption\{\}} & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-XREF-007}{\code{JSS-XREF-007}} & Cross-reference nouns are spelled out (Figure/Section/Table), not abbreviated (Fig./Sec./Tab.) & 100.0\% \\
\addlinespace
\multicolumn{3}{l}{\textbf{House style}} \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-HOUSE-001}{\code{JSS-HOUSE-001}} & ``e.g.'' and ``i.e.'' are followed by a comma so LaTeX does not treat the period as a sentence end & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-HOUSE-002}{\code{JSS-HOUSE-002}} & Book editions are indicated as 2nd, 3rd, etc., not as ``second'' or ``2e'' & 100.0\% \\
\hypertarget{rule:JSS-HOUSE-003}{\code{JSS-HOUSE-003}} & Preamble avoids loading LaTeX packages that jss.cls already provides (graphicx, xcolor, ae, fancyvrb, hyperref) & 100.0\% \\
